ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_5" INTEGER /* 5-digit zip code */,
  "zip_zcta" INTEGER /* Zip/ZCTA code */,
  "land_sq_mi" REAL /* Land area of the zip code in square miles */,
  "zip_4" TEXT /* 4-digit extension of the zip code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the center of the zip code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the center of the zip code */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the zip code was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the zip code data was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code the population data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population data was collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the zip code */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Male population of the zip code */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Female population of the zip code */,
  "age_0_14" INTEGER /* Population aged 0-14 */,
  "age_15_64" INTEGER /* Population aged 15-64 */,
  "age_65_plus" INTEGER /* Population aged 65 and above */,
  "race_white" INTEGER /* Population of the white race */,
  "race_black" INTEGER /* Population of the black race */,
  "race_asian" INTEGER /* Population of the Asian race */,
  "race_hispanic" INTEGER /* Population of the Hispanic race */,
  "race_other" INTEGER /* Population of other races */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "density_data" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each density data entry */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code the density data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the density data was collected */,
  "density_per_sq_mi" REAL /* Population density of the zip code per square mile */,
  "male_density" REAL /* Male population density per square mile */,
  "female_density" REAL /* Female population density per square mile */,
  "density_0_14" REAL /* Population density of those aged 0-14 per square mile */,
  "density_15_64" REAL /* Population density of those aged 15-64 per square mile */,
  "density_65_plus" REAL /* Population density of those aged 65 and above per square mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_density_data_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the city belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the city in square miles */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the city data was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the city data was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the state in square miles */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the state data was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the state data was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_code_city" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the zip code belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id", "city_id")
)
